name: Orris Root Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep the orris root in vodka or brandy in a tightly closed jar, shaking occasionally.
2. After one week, filter through cheesecloth and add the sugar syrup.
3. Allow it to stand undisturbed for a couple of months. The liqueur may remain cloudy but can be clarified by letting it sit longer and siphoning off the clear portion. This process improves the flavor over time.
